name: Joe Machi
blurb: He placed fourth on the eighth season of NBCs Last Comic Standing in 2014 and has performed on late-night television.
bio: Joe Machi is an American stand-up comedian known for his nasal, sing-song delivery and bright, absurdist persona built around earnest non sequiturs and wordplay. He placed fourth on the eighth season of NBCs Last Comic Standing in 2014 and has performed on late-night television. He is a recurring panelist on Fox News program Gutfeld!.

timeline.ev: Moves to New York City to pursue stand-up
Finishes fourth on Last Comic Standing season 8
Comedy Central Half Hour special airs

accolades: Fourth place, Last Comic Standing season 8 (2014)
Winner, New York Comedy Festivals Funniest Comedian competition (2013)
